pageContext.name: William Stout Dinosaur Series: The Cretaceous Era (Set of 4)
pageContext.description: Sideshow Art Prints presents the William Stout Dinosaur Series: The Cretaceous Era (Set of 4) Fine Art Prints.   This colorful dinosaur art collection by iconic fantasy artist William Stout imagines a panorama of prehistoric life across the Cretaceous period. The four individual portraits depict lush landscapes and the wild, untamed ecosystems these fearsome creatures called home. The William Stout Dinosaur Series: The Cretaceous Era (Set of 4) includes a vicious Tyrannosaurus rex, a pair of protective Protoceratops, a carnivorous Carnotaurus, and the spiked Styracosaurus. United by a yellowed horizon dotted with pterosaurs and even an erupting volcano, these windows into a primordial world create one cohesive, majestic scene when displayed in a row.  Each William Stout Dinosaur Series: The Cretaceous Era (Set of 4) Fine Art Prints features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of this exciting release through Sideshow. Available as unframed giclée prints using archival inks, this collection is a must-have for dinosaur enthusiasts of any age.  From fossils to fine art, add the William Stout Dinosaur Series: The Cretaceous Era (Set of 4) Fine Art Prints to your collection today!
